inputs.body:
let Incident_IPs = '@{variables('IPAddress')}';
_GetWatchlist('firewallblockedip')
| where SearchKey == Incident_IPs
| project LastUpdatedTimeUTC,SearchKey

body.messageBody: IP @{body('CHECK_Endpoint')?['data']?['ipAddress']} from @{body('CHECK_Endpoint')?['data']?['domain']} is auto rejected in India region.
IP @{variables('IPAddress')} of domain @{body('CHECK_Endpoint')?['data']?['domain']} from country @{body('Query_IP')?['country']} is auto blocked in UAE region.

body.message: The playbook initiated for blocking the IP address - @{variables('IPaddress')} was successful both in PROD Environement and it was updated in the watchlist "Firewall_Blocked_IP"

Email_Approval_Body.inputs:
Firewall IP Blocking

Dear User,
A blacklisted IP address is identified in your network which requires immediate action to avoid any potential security breaches and to safeguard the network. Please find the details below and take immediate action on priority.

IP @{triggerBody()?['Entity']?['properties']?['Address']}
Country Name @{body('Query_IP')?['country']}
Country Code @{body('Query_IP')?['countryCode']}
ISP @{body('CHECK_Endpoint')?['data']?['isp']}
Domain @{body('CHECK_Endpoint')?['data']?['domain']}
IPConfidenceScore @{body('CHECK_Endpoint')?['data']?['abuseConfidenceScore']}

SOC Recommendations

Block the source IP @{triggerBody()?['Entity']?['properties']?['Address']} which is blacklisted, if it doesn't come under your business requirements.

Disclaimer: Kindly validate the object before proceeding with the approval whether it comes under business requirements.

Message.Subject: Approval Request for Blocking IP on EDL Server [@{variables('IPaddress')}] || UAE

body.message: The playbook initiated for blocking the IP address - @{variables('IPaddress')} was successful both in PROD Environement and it was updated in the watchlist "Firewall_Blocked_IP"

body.Subject: [concat('On-Premise Connection Failure in Logic App "', parameters('workflows_AEAZ_Firewall_IP_Blocking_name'), ' "')]
body.Body:
Dear Member


The Request Raised for Firewall Blocking was Unsuccessfull , Due failure in connection of "Append file to Prod Server (Dc)"


Please find below details for raised request:

Incident Title : @{body('Get_incident')?['properties']?['title']}

Incident Owner : @{body('Get_incident')?['properties']?['owner']?['assignedTo']}

IP Address : @{variables('IPaddress')}


Regards
Pinelabs SOAR bot

body.messageBody: IP @{variables('IPAddress')} of domain @{body('CHECK_Endpoint')?['data']?['domain']} from country @{body('Query_IP')?['country']} is approved and blocked in India region.
IP @{variables('IPAddress')} of domain @{body('CHECK_Endpoint')?['data']?['domain']} from country @{body('Query_IP')?['country']} is rejected and Not blocked in India region.

body.message: The playbook initiated for blocking the IP address - @{variables('IPaddress')} was prematurely halted, as the IP had already been flagged and listed on the firewall list
